name: Bug Report | Bug 报告
about: Report a bug | 报告一个 bug
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description | Bug 描述
<!-- Briefly describe the issue | 简要描述遇到的问题 -->

## Environment | 环境信息
- OS | 操作系统: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 13.0]
- Shell: [e.g. bash, zsh]
- OpenClaw Version | 版本: [e.g. v1.0.0]

## Steps to Reproduce | 复现步骤
1. Execute | 执行 '...'
2. See | 看到 '...'
3. Error occurs | 出现错误 '...'

## Expected Behavior | 预期行为
<!-- Describe what you expected to happen | 描述你期望发生什么 -->

## Actual Behavior | 实际行为
<!-- Describe what actually happened | 描述实际发生了什么 -->

## Error Logs | 错误日志
```
Paste relevant error logs here | 粘贴相关的错误日志
```

## Screenshots | 截图
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots | 如果适用，添加截图帮助说明问题 -->

## Additional Information | 额外信息
<!-- Any other relevant information | 其他相关信息 -->
